name: The Greens Indoor Golf & Bar
about: The Greens Indoor Golf & Bar is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Orlando, Florida. It is powered by TrackMan technology, offering simulators that provide real-time shot feedback, club path analysis, and ball speed data on over 230 famous golf courses. The venue features a practice putting green, a full bar with beverages, and food delivery from neighboring restaurants, including JoJo's Shake Shack. It is designed to be a family-friendly environment that caters to both serious golfers and those looking for entertainment. Pricing is based on per bay hourly rates, with the option to rent clubs for $10 and accommodate up to four players per bay.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by TrackMan, the world's #1 rated simulator, providing high precision and accuracy
Access to over 230 of the world's most famous golf courses and tournament opportunities
Family-friendly environment with a full bar and food delivery options for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Food delivered from neighboring restaurants, including JoJo's Shake Shack, with options ranging from wings to award-winning gourmet burgers
Full bar offering an extensive assortment of cocktails, draft beers, and wines

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced radar technology trusted by PGA professionals

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs for the most accurate numbers, or rent them for $10.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned; the venue offers a full bar and food delivery from neighboring restaurants.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not explicitly stated, but it depends on the simulator's software and course selection.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Greens is described as a family-friendly environment suitable for golfers and non-golfers alike.
